mentions.note: Housing stock rallying after mass downgrades; supply arriving to quell demand; home prices coming down to 2019 levels in many markets; group leader.
Down 3.4%; high-end homebuilder downgrade; group experiencing artificial shrieks.
Home builder with strong fundamentals and balance sheet; interest rate environment supportive; buy on dips despite market volatility.
High-end home builder; very tough to own home builders when rates are rising, but not down as much as others.
Cramer owns it; thinks solid despite rate headwinds. CEO Doug Yearley executing well. 20%+ cash buyers insulate from mortgage dependency; preferred over Pulte in rising-rate environment.
Only home builder that can handle high-rate environment; 25% of homes bought with cash insulates from mortgage rate pressure. Only one that can handle the situation.
